/home/witsa/tools/intel/oneapi/mpi/2021.17/bin/mpiifx -fiopenmp  -g -O2 CMakeFiles/dftb+.dir/dftbplus.f90.o -o dftb+  -Wl,-rpath,/home/witsa/AutomationScripts/dftbplus/_build_intel/src/dftbp:/home/witsa/AutomationScripts/dftbplus/_build_intel/external/mpifx/origin/lib:/home/witsa/AutomationScripts/dftbplus/_build_intel/external/scalapackfx/origin/lib: ../../src/dftbp/libdftbplus.so ../../external/mpifx/origin/lib/libmpifx.so ../../external/scalapackfx/origin/lib/libscalapackfx.so -lmkl_intel_lp64 -lmkl_intel_thread -lmkl_core -liomp5 -lpthread -lm -ldl
